states.name: MoveTo(λ_target_overlap(), True)
states.description: Move to overlap to side, about 33 degrees, 5 meters from ball. Call for ball from teammate.

states.name: StopAndReceiveBall()
states.description: Now get ready to receive the ball from teammate. Wait until ball arrives and you have possession.

states.name: Shoot(goal)
states.description: Take a shot towards goal now.

states.name: Pass(teammate)
states.description: Pass the ball to your teammate so they can shoot.

transitions.description: Wait for teammate to pass you the ball before moving again.
The path to the goal is clear. Prepare to shoot.
Path to the goal is blocked by teammate or opponent.
